narrative:
Pettisville (precinct in Fulton County) has 1,283 registered voters, with 45.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 47.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 41.7 percentage points.
